violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw vegetables sitting on top of raw chicken in the walk in cooler.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Thawing in the handwash sink and meat on the counter.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Thawing in the handwash sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust buildup on the kitchen ceiling.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items . -Chemical bottle on the cart with bread and buns underneath it.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
